name: rate_limiter
description: an API rate-limiter world (token bucket) with refill; actions request, refill, throttle

card.description: an API rate-limiter world (token bucket) with refill; actions request, refill, throttle

rules: The bucket holds between 0 and `capacity` tokens at all times.

A `request` costs 1 token normally, or `throttle_cost` tokens while throttled; if the bucket holds enough tokens it is granted (tokens decrease, `served` += 1), otherwise it is rate-limited (`denied` += 1) and tokens are unchanged.
`request` may carry a `count` param to attempt several calls in one step (a burst).
`refill` adds `refill_amount` tokens (or a `amount` param override), capped at `capacity`.
`throttle` toggles defensive throttling, or sets it explicitly via an `on` param.
Dynamics are deterministic: identical (state, action) always yield the same next state.
